name: Moktar War-Screamer
oracle_text:
Haste
Whenever ~ attacks, it gets +1/+0 until end of turn for each other attacking creature.
flavor_text: The moktars have no word for "retreat." They also have no word for "planning," "subtlety," or "indoors."

validation_errors: Non-creature card has power and/or toughness set
Card has power/toughness but 'Creature' is not in card_types

design_notes: Red uncommon attacker that rewards going wide. 4 CMC for a 3/2 haste is below rate on its own (P+T = 5, CMC+3 = 7, well within budget), but the scaling attack bonus makes it a legitimate threat in aggressive decks. The bonus is genuinely variable -- depends on board state and attack decisions. Fits the Moktar Raider/warband flavor. Haste is fine here since no Malfunction. Two abilities (haste + triggered) is appropriate for uncommon.
